queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and risk mitigation.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of the credit amount requested and its contribution to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between a negative checking account balance and reduced credit default probability.
